task_completion.description: Reassign the SSL certificate renewal task to Bob Smith and change its status to 'In progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject interface, the work package 'Automate SSL certificate renewal with Certbot' should display 'Bob Smith' as the Assignee and 'In progress' as the Status.

task_completion.description: Log 1.5 hours on the Kubernetes autoscaling task with the specified comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Kubernetes cluster autoscaling misconfigured' work package should show a logged time entry of '1.50h' (or 1.5 hours) with the comment 'Workload review and priority reassessment'.

task_completion.description: Create a new 'Task' for sprint capacity planning assigned to Alice Johnson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A work package titled 'Sprint capacity planning review' exists in the 'devops-automation' project. It must show 'Alice Johnson' as the Assignee, 'Sprint 2 - Deploy Automation' as the Version/Sprint, and contain the description starting with 'Review team velocity data...'.

task_completion.description: Add the required comment to the blue-green deployment strategy task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Implement blue-green deployment strategy' work package's activity/comments section must contain a comment stating: 'Discussed in workload review meeting. This is now the top priority for Alice after Carol is unblocked from autoscaling work. Target completion: end of Sprint 2.'

task_completion.description: Create a wiki page documenting the sprint workload review.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wiki page titled 'Sprint Workload Review' exists in the 'devops-automation' project. The content should visibly mention the reassignment of the SSL task, Carol being overloaded, current team assignments, and action items.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web GUI to perform tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the OpenProject web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal to send API requests (e.g., curl) or run scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, psql, or rails console being used to directly insert or update database records.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual OpenProject forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text for descriptions, comments, and wiki content should be seen typed into the OpenProject text editors and input fields, not just written in a separate text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 'devops-automation'.
